description: Horned, tail-bearing heirs of infernal pacts, distrusted everywhere yet fiercely self-reliant.
subraces: Asmodeus Tiefling
Silver-tongued schemers touched by the Lord of the Nine, gifted with fire and charm magic.
Baalzebul Tiefling
Corruption-tainted manipulators wielding magic that rots resolve and spreads despair.
Dispater Tiefling
Iron-willed infiltrators blessed with disguise magic and a talent for espionage.
Fierna Tiefling
Seductive charmers whose enchantment magic bends emotions and clouds judgment.
Glasya Tiefling
Roguish tricksters gifted with invisibility and a knack for slipping past any security.
Levistus Tiefling
Ice-touched survivors with frost magic and an instinct for self-preservation above all.
Mammon Tiefling
Gold-obsessed dealmakers whose magic uncovers hidden wealth and compels honest answers.
Mephistopheles Tiefling
Arcane prodigies touched by hellfire, channeling magic through sheer intellectual force.
Zariel Tiefling
War-bred crusaders with smite-like power and an aggressive drive to lead from the front.
Feral Tiefling
Wild-eyed outcasts with bestial features, relying on agility over charm.
Devil's Tongue Tiefling
Honey-voiced deceivers replacing fire magic with enchantments compelling obedience.
Hellfire Tiefling
Blaze-wreathed pyromancers trading subtlety for raw, scorching destructive power.
Winged Tiefling
Bat-winged outcasts having traded innate magic for the freedom of true flight.
